conversation.text: How much is a UK local number?

UK local DID numbers are available through M800's global rate table. The specific UK DID monthly fee wasn't in the rate data I have immediately available, but pricing varies by country. For the exact UK rate, you can check m800.com/pricing or I can connect you with sales. Source: M800 Global Rates (f7).

For a Germany local DID number — the rate wasn't in the chunks I retrieved either, but it would also be listed in the M800 Global Rates table by country. I'd recommend checking m800.com/pricing under Germany, or I can get sales to send you a regional rate comparison. Source: M800 Global Rates (f7).

Same applies for a Hong Kong local DID number — pricing is region-specific and listed in our global rate table. For HK rates, check m800.com/pricing or I'll connect you with the team for a comprehensive breakdown across UK, Germany, and HK. Source: M800 Global Rates (f7).
